ALM-20260623-001.title: PM close
ALM-20260623-001.description: CH-B 完成 dry pump filter 清洁，设备恢复生产。

ALM-20260623-001.title: Recipe loaded
ALM-20260623-001.description: recipe 从 OX-ETCH-45N-A2 切换到 OX-ETCH-45N-A3。

ALM-20260623-001.title: Pressure variance rising
ALM-20260623-001.description: foreline pressure 方差连续 6 分钟高于同 recipe P95。

ALM-20260623-001.title: Throttle valve oscillation
ALM-20260623-001.description: throttle valve position 在 42%-78% 之间快速摆动。

ALM-20260623-001.title: VAC-LOW-302
ALM-20260623-001.description: 真空不足报警触发，设备进入 DOWN。

ALM-20260623-001.title: Lot held
ALM-20260623-001.description: 值班工程师 hold L26A0619，等待设备确认。

ALM-20260623-002.title: APC offset changed
ALM-20260623-002.description: APC 对 heater zone 2 增加 +1.8C offset。

ALM-20260623-002.title: Lot started
ALM-20260623-002.description: L26A0621 开始在 CVD-12 CH-A 加工。

ALM-20260623-002.title: Temperature drift
ALM-20260623-002.description: zone 2 temperature 连续 9 个采样点上升。

ALM-20260623-003.title: Nozzle replaced
ALM-20260623-003.description: TRACK-1 edge rinse nozzle 更换。

ALM-20260623-003.title: Edge-ring pattern
ALM-20260623-003.description: W02-W25 多片 wafer 出现 edge-ring defect pattern。

ALM-MOCK-9002.title: RF reflected power rising
ALM-MOCK-9002.description: reflected power 连续 4 分钟高于同 recipe P90。

ALM-MOCK-9002.title: RF-MATCH-221
ALM-MOCK-9002.description: RF match reflected power exceeded soft limit，wafer completed with warning。
